chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3880 of 2011 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 09.02.2026. Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Ms. Rabia Saqib, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh alongwith DSP (Legal-II) Raza Mian on behalf of the CPO, Karachi. ------ Mr. Syed Itrat Hussain Rizvi, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Zia Ahmed Awan, learned counsel for the Petitioner, requests for adjournment on the ground that the latter is busy before another Bench. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that no one was in attendance to pursue the matter on the previous date and a question of maintainability has been raised as far back as 08.11.2021. Under such circumstances, the Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
